Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**********************************************************************************

 Basics for strict double categories

 In this file, we lay down the basic notions to define strict double categories.
 In a strict double category, the identity and associativity laws hold strictly,
 so up to an equality of horizontal morphisms. We also show that the type of
 horizontal identities and the type of horizontal composition operations form
 a set if we are looking at a strict 2-sided displayed category.

 Finally, we look at when functors preserve horizontal identities/composition. The
 definitions might look a bit surprising at first. The definition of preservation
 of the identity is given in [preserves_hor_id], and it consists of two parts. The
 first part ([preserves_hor_id_data]) says that the horizontal identity is preserved
 up to equality. However, we also require that the assignment of these equalities
 give rise to a natural transformation ([isaprop_preserves_hor_id_laws]), and that
 is the second part of the definition. For the preservation of horizontal composition,
 we take the same route. THe following has to be noted here:
 - To prove that we have a univalent category of strict double categories, we need
   this naturality condition.
 - This condition is also required in the literature. See, for example, Definition
   12.3.18 in "2-Dimensional Categories" by Johnson and Yau. A strict double functor
   is a lax double functor such that the natural transformations that witness the
   preservation of identity and horizontal composition, are pointwise identities.
   As such, the same naturality condition is required there.

 Contents
 1. Laws for strict double categories
 2. Horizontal identities/composition forms a set
 3. Preservation of horizontal identities
 4. Preservation of horizontal composition
 5. The identity preserves identities and composition
 6. The composition preserves identities and composition

 **********************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Setcategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.CategoryOfSetCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.TwoSidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.DisplayedFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.DisplayedNatTrans.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Strictness.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.TransportLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Basics.DoubleCategoryBasics.

Local Open Scope cat.

Definition transportf_hor_mor
           {C : category}
           {D : twosided_disp_cat C C}
           {x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C}
           {vx : x₁ --> x₂}
           {vy : y₁ --> y₂}
           {h₁ h₂ : D x₁ y₁}
           (p : h₁ = h₂)
           {k₁ k₂ : D x₂ y₂}
           (q : k₁ = k₂)
           (s : h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy ] k₁)
  : h₂ -->[ vx ][ vy ] k₂
  := transportf
       (λ z, z -->[ _ ][ _ ] _)
       p
       (transportf
          (λ z, _ -->[ _ ][ _ ] z)
          q
          s).

Definition transportb_hor_mor
           {C : category}
           {D : twosided_disp_cat C C}
           {x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C}
           {vx : x₁ --> x₂}
           {vy : y₁ --> y₂}
           {h₁ h₂ : D x₁ y₁}
           (p : h₁ = h₂)
           {k₁ k₂ : D x₂ y₂}
           (q : k₁ = k₂)
           (s : h₂ -->[ vx ][ vy ] k₂)
  : h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy ] k₁
  := transportb
       (λ z, z -->[ _ ][ _ ] _)
       p
       (transportb
          (λ z, _ -->[ _ ][ _ ] z)
          q
          s).

(** * 1. Laws for strict double categories *)
Definition strict_double_cat_id_left
           {C : category}
           {D : twosided_disp_cat C C}
           (I : hor_id D)
           (Cm : hor_comp D)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C)
       (f : D x y),
     double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I x) f = f.

Definition strict_double_cat_id_left_square
           {C : category}
           {D : twosided_disp_cat C C}
           {I : hor_id D}
           {Cm : hor_comp D}
           (lp : strict_double_cat_id_left I Cm)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C)
       (v₁ : x₁ --> x₂)
       (v₂ : y₁ --> y₂)
       (h : D x₁ y₁)
       (k : D x₂ y₂)
       (s : h -->[ v₁ ][ v₂ ] k),
     double_hor_comp_mor Cm (double_id_mor I v₁) s
     =
     transportb_hor_mor
       (lp _ _ h)
       (lp _ _ k)
       s.

Definition strict_double_cat_id_right
           {C : category}
           {D : twosided_disp_cat C C}
           (I : hor_id D)
           (Cm : hor_comp D)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C)
       (f : D x y),
     double_hor_comp Cm f (double_id I y) = f.

Definition strict_double_cat_id_right_square
           {C : category}
           {D : twosided_disp_cat C C}
           {I : hor_id D}
           {Cm : hor_comp D}
           (rp : strict_double_cat_id_right I Cm)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C)
       (v₁ : x₁ --> x₂)
       (v₂ : y₁ --> y₂)
       (h : D x₁ y₁)
       (k : D x₂ y₂)
       (s : h -->[ v₁ ][ v₂ ] k),
     double_hor_comp_mor Cm s (double_id_mor I v₂)
     =
     transportb_hor_mor
       (rp _ _ h)
       (rp _ _ k)
       s.

Definition strict_double_cat_assoc
           {C : category}
           {D : twosided_disp_cat C C}
           (Cm : hor_comp D)
  : UU
  := ∏ (w x y z : C)
       (f : D w x)
       (g : D x y)
       (h : D y z),
     double_hor_comp Cm f (double_hor_comp Cm g h)
     =
     double_hor_comp Cm (double_hor_comp Cm f g) h.

Definition strict_double_cat_assoc_square
           {C : category}
           {D : twosided_disp_cat C C}
           {Cm : hor_comp D}
           (ap : strict_double_cat_assoc Cm)
  : UU
  := ∏ (w₁ w₂ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : C)
       (vw : w₁ --> w₂)
       (vx : x₁ --> x₂)
       (vy : y₁ --> y₂)
       (vz : z₁ --> z₂)
       (h₁ : D w₁ x₁) (h₂ : D x₁ y₁) (h₃ : D y₁ z₁)
       (k₁ : D w₂ x₂) (k₂ : D x₂ y₂) (k₃ : D y₂ z₂)
       (s₁ : h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx ] k₁)
       (s₂ : h₂ -->[ vx ][ vy ] k₂)
       (s₃ : h₃ -->[ vy ][ vz ] k₃),
     double_hor_comp_mor Cm s₁ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm s₂ s₃)
     =
     transportb_hor_mor
       (ap _ _ _ _ _ _ _)
       (ap _ _ _ _ _ _ _)
       (double_hor_comp_mor Cm (double_hor_comp_mor Cm s₁ s₂) s₃).

Definition strict_double_cat_laws
           {C : category}
           {D : twosided_disp_cat C C}
           (I : hor_id D)
           (Cm : hor_comp D)
  : UU
  := ∑ (lp : strict_double_cat_id_left I Cm)
       (rp : strict_double_cat_id_right I Cm)
       (ap : strict_double_cat_assoc Cm),
     strict_double_cat_id_left_square lp
     ×
     strict_double_cat_id_right_square rp
     ×
     strict_double_cat_assoc_square ap.


C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
Cm: hor_comp D
isaprop (strict_double_cat_laws I Cm)


C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
Cm: hor_comp D
isaprop (strict_double_cat_laws I Cm)

  
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
Cm: hor_comp D
isaprop
  (∏ (x y : C) (f : D x y),
   double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I x) f = f)
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
Cm: hor_comp D
h: make_hProp
  (∏ (x y : C) (f : D x y),
   double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I x) f = f) ?is
isaprop
  (∑ (rp : strict_double_cat_id_right I Cm)
   (ap : strict_double_cat_assoc Cm),
   strict_double_cat_id_left_square h
   × strict_double_cat_id_right_square rp
     × strict_double_cat_assoc_square ap)

  
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
Cm: hor_comp D
isaprop
  (∏ (x y : C) (f : D x y),
   double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I x) f = f)

    
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
Cm: hor_comp D
t, t0: C
t1: D t t0
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t1 : D t t0,
    double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) t1 = t1) t1)

    apply is_strict_strict_twosided_disp_cat.
  
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
Cm: hor_comp D
h: make_hProp
  (∏ (x y : C) (f : D x y),
   double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I x) f = f)
  (impred 1
     (λ t : C,
      ∏ (y : C) (f : D t y),
      double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) f = f)
     (λ t : C,
      impred 1
        (λ t0 : C,
         ∏ f : D t t0,
         double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) f = f)
        (λ t0 : C,
         impred 1
           (λ t1 : D t t0,
            double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) t1 =
            t1)
           (λ t1 : D t t0,
            is_strict_strict_twosided_disp_cat D t
              t0
              (double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t)
                 t1) t1))))
isaprop
  (∑ (rp : strict_double_cat_id_right I Cm)
   (ap : strict_double_cat_assoc Cm),
   strict_double_cat_id_left_square h
   × strict_double_cat_id_right_square rp
     × strict_double_cat_assoc_square ap)

D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
Cm: hor_comp D
h: make_hProp
  (∏ (x y : C) (f : D x y),
   double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I x) f = f)
  (impred 1
     (λ t : C,
      ∏ (y : C) (f : D t y),
      double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) f = f)
     (λ t : C,
      impred 1
        (λ t0 : C,
         ∏ f : D t t0,
         double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) f = f)
        (λ t0 : C,
         impred 1
           (λ t1 : D t t0,
            double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) t1 =
            t1)
           (λ t1 : D t t0,
            is_strict_strict_twosided_disp_cat D t
              t0
              (double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t)
                 t1) t1))))
isaprop
  (∏ (x y : C) (f : D x y),
   double_hor_comp Cm f (double_id I y) = f)

D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
Cm: hor_comp D
h: make_hProp

   double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I x) f = f)
  (impred 1
     (λ t : C,
      ∏ (y : C) (f : D t y),
      double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) f = f)
     (λ t : C,
      impred 1

h0: make_hProp
  (∏ (x y : C) (f : D x y),
   double_hor_comp Cm f (double_id I y) = f) ?is
isaprop
  (∑ ap : strict_double_cat_assoc Cm,
   strict_double_cat_id_left_square h
   × strict_double_cat_id_right_square h0
     × strict_double_cat_assoc_square ap)

D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
Cm: hor_comp D
h: make_hProp

isaprop
  (∏ (w x y z : C) (f : D w x) (g : D x y)
   (h : D y z),
   double_hor_comp Cm f (double_hor_comp Cm g h) =
   double_hor_comp Cm (double_hor_comp Cm f g) h)

Cm: hor_comp D

h1: make_hProp
  (∏ (w x y z : C) (f : D w x) (g : D x y)
   (h : D y z),
   double_hor_comp Cm f (double_hor_comp Cm g h) =
   double_hor_comp Cm (double_hor_comp Cm f g) h)
  ?is
isaprop
  (∑ _ : strict_double_cat_id_left_square h,
   strict_double_cat_id_right_square h0
   × strict_double_cat_assoc_square h1)

  
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
Cm: hor_comp D
h: make_hProp
  (∏ (x y : C) (f : D x y),
   double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I x) f = f)
  (impred 1
     (λ t : C,
      ∏ (y : C) (f : D t y),
      double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) f = f)
     (λ t : C,
      impred 1
        (λ t0 : C,
         ∏ f : D t t0,
         double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) f = f)
        (λ t0 : C,
         impred 1
           (λ t1 : D t t0,
            double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) t1 =
            t1)
           (λ t1 : D t t0,
            is_strict_strict_twosided_disp_cat D t
              t0
              (double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t)
                 t1) t1))))

   double_hor_comp Cm f (double_id I y) = f)

isaprop
  (∏ (w x y z : C) (f : D w x) (g : D x y)
   (h : D y z),
   double_hor_comp Cm f (double_hor_comp Cm g h) =
   double_hor_comp Cm (double_hor_comp Cm f g) h)

    
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
Cm: hor_comp D
h: make_hProp
  (∏ (x y : C) (f : D x y),
   double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I x) f = f)
  (impred 1
     (λ t : C,
      ∏ (y : C) (f : D t y),
      double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) f = f)
     (λ t : C,
      impred 1
        (λ t0 : C,
         ∏ f : D t t0,
         double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) f = f)
        (λ t0 : C,
         impred 1
           (λ t1 : D t t0,
            double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) t1 =
            t1)
           (λ t1 : D t t0,
            is_strict_strict_twosided_disp_cat D t
              t0
              (double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t)
                 t1) t1))))
h0: make_hProp
  (∏ (x y : C) (f : D x y),
   double_hor_comp Cm f (double_id I y) = f)
  (impred 1
     (λ t : C,
      ∏ (y : C) (f : D t y),
      double_hor_comp Cm f (double_id I y) = f)
     (λ t : C,
      impred 1
        (λ t0 : C,
         ∏ f : D t t0,
         double_hor_comp Cm f (double_id I t0) =
         f)
        (λ t0 : C,
         impred 1
           (λ t1 : D t t0,
            double_hor_comp Cm t1
              (double_id I t0) = t1)
           (λ t1 : D t t0,
            is_strict_strict_twosided_disp_cat D
              t t0
              (double_hor_comp Cm t1
                 (double_id I t0)) t1))))
t, t0, t1, t2: C
t3: D t t0
t4: D t0 t1
t5: D t1 t2
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t5 : D t1 t2,
    double_hor_comp Cm t3 (double_hor_comp Cm t4 t5) =
    double_hor_comp Cm (double_hor_comp Cm t3 t4) t5)
     t5)

    apply is_strict_strict_twosided_disp_cat.
  
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
Cm: hor_comp D
h: make_hProp
  (∏ (x y : C) (f : D x y),
   double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I x) f = f)
  (impred 1
     (λ t : C,
      ∏ (y : C) (f : D t y),
      double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) f = f)
     (λ t : C,
      impred 1
        (λ t0 : C,
         ∏ f : D t t0,
         double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) f = f)
        (λ t0 : C,
         impred 1
           (λ t1 : D t t0,
            double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t) t1 =
            t1)
           (λ t1 : D t t0,
            is_strict_strict_twosided_disp_cat D t
              t0
              (double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I t)
                 t1) t1))))
h0: make_hProp
  (∏ (x y : C) (f : D x y),
   double_hor_comp Cm f (double_id I y) = f)
  (impred 1
     (λ t : C,
      ∏ (y : C) (f : D t y),
      double_hor_comp Cm f (double_id I y) = f)
     (λ t : C,
      impred 1
        (λ t0 : C,
         ∏ f : D t t0,
         double_hor_comp Cm f (double_id I t0) =
         f)
        (λ t0 : C,
         impred 1
           (λ t1 : D t t0,
            double_hor_comp Cm t1
              (double_id I t0) = t1)
           (λ t1 : D t t0,
            is_strict_strict_twosided_disp_cat D
              t t0
              (double_hor_comp Cm t1
                 (double_id I t0)) t1))))
h1: make_hProp
  (∏ (w x y z : C) (f : D w x) (g : D x y)
   (h : D y z),
   double_hor_comp Cm f (double_hor_comp Cm g h) =
   double_hor_comp Cm (double_hor_comp Cm f g) h)
  (impred 1
     (λ t : C,
      ∏ (x y z : C) (f : D t x) (g : D x y)
      (h : D y z),
      double_hor_comp Cm f
        (double_hor_comp Cm g h) =
      double_hor_comp Cm (double_hor_comp Cm f g)
        h)
     (λ t : C,
      impred 1
        (λ t0 : C,
         ∏ (y z : C) (f : D t t0) (g : D t0 y)
         (h : D y z),
         double_hor_comp Cm f
           (double_hor_comp Cm g h) =
         double_hor_comp Cm
           (double_hor_comp Cm f g) h)
        (λ t0 : C,
         impred 1
           (λ t1 : C,
            ∏ (z : C) (f : D t t0) (g : D t0 t1)
            (h : D t1 z),
            double_hor_comp Cm f
              (double_hor_comp Cm g h) =
            double_hor_comp Cm
              (double_hor_comp Cm f g) h)
           (λ t1 : C,
            impred 1
              (λ t2 : C,
               ∏ (f : D t t0) (g : D t0 t1)
               (h : D t1 t2),
               double_hor_comp Cm f
                 (double_hor_comp Cm g h) =
               double_hor_comp Cm
                 (double_hor_comp Cm f g) h)
              (λ t2 : C,
               impred 1
                 (λ t3 : D t t0,
                  ∏ (g : D t0 t1) (h : D t1 t2),
                  double_hor_comp Cm t3
                    (double_hor_comp Cm g h) =
                  double_hor_comp Cm
                    (double_hor_comp Cm t3 g) h)
                 (λ t3 : D t t0,
                  impred 1
                    (λ t4 : D t0 t1,
                     ∏ h : D t1 t2,
                     double_hor_comp Cm t3
                       (double_hor_comp Cm t4 h) =
                     double_hor_comp Cm
                       (double_hor_comp Cm t3 t4)
                       h)
                    (λ t4 : D t0 t1,
                     impred 1
                       (λ t5 : D t1 t2,
                        double_hor_comp Cm t3
                          (double_hor_comp Cm t4
                             t5) =
                        double_hor_comp Cm
                          (double_hor_comp Cm t3
                             t4) t5)
                       (λ t5 : D t1 t2,
                        is_strict_strict_twosided_disp_cat
                          D t t2
                          (double_hor_comp Cm t3
                             (...))
                          (double_hor_comp Cm
                             (...) t5)))))))))
isaprop
  (∑ _ : strict_double_cat_id_left_square h,
   strict_double_cat_id_right_square h0
   × strict_double_cat_assoc_square h1)

  
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
Cm: hor_comp D
h: ∏ (x y : C) (f : D x y),
double_hor_comp Cm (double_id I x) f = f
h0: ∏ (x y : C) (f : D x y),
double_hor_comp Cm f (double_id I y) = f
h1: ∏ (w x y z : C) (f : D w x) (g : D x y)
(h : D y z),
double_hor_comp Cm f (double_hor_comp Cm g h) =
double_hor_comp Cm (double_hor_comp Cm f g) h
isaprop
  (∑ _ : strict_double_cat_id_left_square h,
   strict_double_cat_id_right_square h0
   × strict_double_cat_assoc_square h1)

  repeat (use isapropdirprod) ;
  repeat (use impred ; intro) ;
    apply isaset_disp_mor.
Qed.

(** * 2. Horizontal identities/composition forms a set *)

C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isaset (hor_id D)


C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isaset (hor_id D)

  
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isaset (hor_id_data D)
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
∏ x : hor_id_data D, isaset (hor_id_laws x)

  
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isaset (hor_id_data D)
 
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isaset (∏ x : C, D x x)
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
∏ x : ∏ x : C, D x x,
isaset
  ((λ x0 : ∏ x0 : C, D x0 x0,
    ∏ (x1 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, y ⟧),
    x0 x1 -->[ f ][ f] x0 y) x)

    
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isaset (∏ x : C, D x x)
 
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
t: C
isaset ((λ t : C, D t t) t)

      apply is_strict_strict_twosided_disp_cat.
    
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
∏ x : ∏ x : C, D x x,
isaset
  ((λ x0 : ∏ x0 : C, D x0 x0,
    ∏ (x1 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x1, y ⟧),
    x0 x1 -->[ f ][ f] x0 y) x)
 
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: ∏ x : C, D x x
isaset
  ((λ x : ∏ x : C, D x x,
    ∏ (x0 y : C) (f : C ⟦ x0, y ⟧),
    x x0 -->[ f ][ f] x y) I)

      
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: ∏ x : C, D x x
t, t0: C
t1: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
isaset
  ((λ t1 : C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧, I t -->[ t1 ][ t1] I t0) t1)

      apply isaset_disp_mor.
  
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
∏ x : hor_id_data D, isaset (hor_id_laws x)
 
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
x: hor_id_data D
isaset (hor_id_laws x)

    
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
x: hor_id_data D
isaprop (hor_id_laws x)

    apply isaprop_hor_id_laws.
Qed.


C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isaset (hor_comp D)


C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isaset (hor_comp D)

  
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isaset (hor_comp_data D)
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
∏ x : hor_comp_data D, isaset (hor_comp_laws x)

  
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isaset (hor_comp_data D)
 
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isaset (∏ x y z : C, D x y → D y z → D x z)
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
∏ x : ∏ x y z : C, D x y → D y z → D x z,
isaset
  ((λ x0 : ∏ x0 y z : C, D x0 y → D y z → D x0 z,
    ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : C) (v₁ : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
    (v₂ : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (v₃ : C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
    (h₁ : D x₁ y₁) (h₂ : D y₁ z₁) (k₁ : D x₂ y₂)
    (k₂ : D y₂ z₂),
    h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
    → h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
      → x0 x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ h₂ -->[ v₁
        ][ v₃] x0 x₂ y₂ z₂ k₁ k₂) x)

    
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
isaset (∏ x y z : C, D x y → D y z → D x z)
 
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
t, t0, t1: C
t2: D t t0
t3: D t0 t1
isaset ((λ _ : D t0 t1, D t t1) t3)

      apply is_strict_strict_twosided_disp_cat.
    
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
∏ x : ∏ x y z : C, D x y → D y z → D x z,
isaset
  ((λ x0 : ∏ x0 y z : C, D x0 y → D y z → D x0 z,
    ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : C) (v₁ : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
    (v₂ : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (v₃ : C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
    (h₁ : D x₁ y₁) (h₂ : D y₁ z₁) (k₁ : D x₂ y₂)
    (k₂ : D y₂ z₂),
    h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
    → h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
      → x0 x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ h₂ -->[ v₁
        ][ v₃] x0 x₂ y₂ z₂ k₁ k₂) x)
 
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: ∏ x y z : C, D x y → D y z → D x z
isaset
  ((λ x : ∏ x y z : C, D x y → D y z → D x z,
    ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : C) (v₁ : C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
    (v₂ : C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (v₃ : C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
    (h₁ : D x₁ y₁) (h₂ : D y₁ z₁) (k₁ : D x₂ y₂)
    (k₂ : D y₂ z₂),
    h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
    → h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
      → x x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ h₂ -->[ v₁
        ][ v₃] x x₂ y₂ z₂ k₁ k₂) I)

      
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
I: ∏ x y z : C, D x y → D y z → D x z
t, t0, t1, t2, t3, t4: C
t5: C ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t6: C ⟦ t1, t2 ⟧
t7: C ⟦ t3, t4 ⟧
t8: D t t1
t9: D t1 t3
t10: D t0 t2
t11: D t2 t4
t12: t8 -->[ t5 ][ t6] t10
t13: t9 -->[ t6 ][ t7] t11
isaset
  ((λ _ : t9 -->[ t6 ][ t7] t11,
    I t t1 t3 t8 t9 -->[ t5 ][ t7] I t0 t2 t4 t10 t11)
     t13)

      apply isaset_disp_mor.
  
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
∏ x : hor_comp_data D, isaset (hor_comp_laws x)
 
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
x: hor_comp_data D
isaset (hor_comp_laws x)

    
C: category
D: strict_twosided_disp_cat C C
x: hor_comp_data D
isaprop (hor_comp_laws x)

    apply isaprop_hor_comp_laws.
Qed.

(** * 3. Preservation of horizontal identities *)
Definition preserves_hor_id_data
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {D₁ : twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁}
           {D₂ : twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂}
           (I₁ : hor_id D₁)
           (I₂ : hor_id D₂)
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           (FF : twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x : C₁),
     FF _ _ (double_id I₁ x)
     =
     double_id I₂ (F x).

Definition preserves_hor_id_laws
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {D₁ : twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁}
           {D₂ : twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂}
           {I₁ : hor_id D₁}
           {I₂ : hor_id D₂}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {FF : twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂}
           (FFI : preserves_hor_id_data I₁ I₂ FF)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y : C₁)
       (f : x --> y),
     #2 FF (double_id_mor I₁ f)
     ;;2
     idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath _) (idpath _) (FFI y)
     =
     transportf_disp_mor2
       (id_left _ @ !(id_right _))
       (id_left _ @ !(id_right _))
       (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath _) (idpath _) (FFI x)
        ;;2
        double_id_mor I₂ (#F f)).


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id_data I₁ I₂ FF
isaprop (preserves_hor_id_laws FFI)


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id_data I₁ I₂ FF
isaprop (preserves_hor_id_laws FFI)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id_data I₁ I₂ FF
t, t0: C₁
t1: C₁ ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t1 : C₁ ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
    (#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ t1) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F t0))
                                        (idpath (F t0))
                                        (FFI t0) =
    trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F t))
            (idpath (F t)) (FFI t) ;;2 double_id_mor
                                         I₂ (# F t1)))
     t1)

  apply isaset_disp_mor.
Qed.

Definition preserves_hor_id
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {D₁ : twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁}
           {D₂ : twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂}
           (I₁ : hor_id D₁)
           (I₂ : hor_id D₂)
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           (FF : twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂)
  : UU
  := ∑ (FFI : preserves_hor_id_data I₁ I₂ FF),
     preserves_hor_id_laws FFI.

Definition make_preserves_hor_id
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {D₁ : twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁}
           {D₂ : twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂}
           (I₁ : hor_id D₁)
           (I₂ : hor_id D₂)
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           (FF : twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂)
           (FFI : preserves_hor_id_data I₁ I₂ FF)
           (HFFI : preserves_hor_id_laws FFI)
  : preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
  := FFI ,, HFFI.

Definition preserves_hor_id_to_data
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {D₁ : twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁}
           {D₂ : twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂}
           {I₁ : hor_id D₁}
           {I₂ : hor_id D₂}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {FF : twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂}
           (FFI : preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF)
           (x : C₁)
  : FF _ _ (double_id I₁ x)
    =
    double_id I₂ (F x)
  := pr1 FFI x.

Coercion preserves_hor_id_to_data : preserves_hor_id >-> Funclass.


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
(#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                   (idpath (F y))
                                   (idpath (F y))
                                   (FFI y) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
        (idpath (F x)) (FFI x) ;;2 double_id_mor I₂
                                     (# F f))


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
(#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                   (idpath (F y))
                                   (idpath (F y))
                                   (FFI y) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
        (idpath (F x)) (FFI x) ;;2 double_id_mor I₂
                                     (# F f))

  exact (pr2 FFI x y f).
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trb₂ ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath (F y))
                                         (idpath (F y))
                                         (FFI y)) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
  (FFI x) ;;2 double_id_mor I₂ (# F f)


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trb₂ ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath (F y))
                                         (idpath (F y))
                                         (FFI y)) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
  (FFI x) ;;2 double_id_mor I₂ (# F f)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trb₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
              (idpath (F x)) (FFI x) ;;2 double_id_mor
                                           I₂ (# F f))) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
  (FFI x) ;;2 double_id_mor I₂ (# F f)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
  (FFI x) ;;2 double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
  (FFI x) ;;2 double_id_mor I₂ (# F f)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath (F y))
                               (idpath (F y))
                               (! FFI y) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
        (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                       (double_id_mor
                                          I₁ f))


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath (F y))
                               (idpath (F y))
                               (! FFI y) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
        (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                       (double_id_mor
                                          I₁ f))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y) ;;2 
      id_two_disp (FF y y (double_id I₁ y))) =
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
              (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                             (double_id_mor
                                                I₁ f)) ;;2 
      id_two_disp (FF y y (double_id I₁ y)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y) ;;2 
      id_two_disp (FF y y (double_id I₁ y))) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
              (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                             (double_id_mor
                                                I₁ f)) ;;2 
      id_two_disp (FF y y (double_id I₁ y)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y) ;;2 
      id_two_disp (FF y y (double_id I₁ y))) = ?b

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
id_two_disp (FF y y (double_id I₁ y)) = ?t2

    exact (inv_after_iso_twosided_disp_alt
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath _) (idpath _) (FFI y))).
  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
               (idpath (F y)) (FFI y) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                            (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                               (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                               (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                               (FFI y))))) =
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
              (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                             (double_id_mor
                                                I₁ f)) ;;2 
      id_two_disp (FF y y (double_id I₁ y)))

                                           (idpath
                                              (F y))
                                           (idpath
                                              (F y))
                                           (! FFI y) ;;2 
            (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))

                                            (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                               (idpath

                                               (idpath

                                               (FFI y))))) =

              (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                             (double_id_mor
                                                I₁ f)) ;;2 
      id_two_disp (FF y y (double_id I₁ y)))

                                     (idpath (F y))

                                      (idtoiso_twosided_disp

                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
        (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                       (double_id_mor
                                          I₁ f) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
        (idpath (F y)) (FFI y) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y))) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
        (idpath (F y)) (FFI y) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

        (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                       (double_id_mor
                                          I₁ f) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))

x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
  (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (FFI
                                                 y) ;;2 
iso_inv_twosided_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y)) (idpath (F y))
     (FFI y)) = ?t2

x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
  (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (FFI
                                                 y) =
?y'

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
        (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x) ;;2 ((#2 FF)
                                        (double_id_mor

C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
(#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                   (idpath (F y))
                                   (idpath (F y))
                                   (FFI y) = ?t2

    apply is_natural_preserves_hor_id.
  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
              (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x) ;;2 (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x))
                                                 (FFI
                                                 x) ;;2 
                                                 double_id_mor
                                                 I₂
                                                 (# F
                                                 f)))) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
           (idpath (F y)) (FFI y))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
        (idpath (F y)) (FFI y) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
                    (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x))
                                                 (idpath

                                                 (FFI
                                                 x) ;;2 
                                                 double_id_mor
                                                 I₂
                                                 (# F

        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))

trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
        (idpath (F y)) (FFI y) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

                    (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x))
                                                 (idpath

                                                 double_id_mor
                                                 I₂
                                                 (# F
                                                 f)) ;;2 
                  iso_inv_twosided_disp
                    (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath (F y)) (idpath (F y))
                       (FFI y))))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))

      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
        (idpath (F y)) (FFI y) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp

                                        (FFI y)))

                                        (idpath (F x))

trf₂ (trb₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
              (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                             (idpath

        (idpath (F y)) (FFI y) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp

                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))

        (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                       (idpath (F x))

x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
  (! FFI x) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
                  (idpath (F x)) (FFI x) ;;2 double_id_mor
                                               I₂
                                               (# F f) ;;2 
iso_inv_twosided_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y)) (idpath (F y))
     (FFI y)) = ?t2

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
  (! FFI x) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
                  (idpath (F x)) (FFI x) = ?y'

    apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat.
  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
                (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x @ FFI x)) ;;2 
      double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
        (idpath (F y)) (FFI y) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
                (idpath (F x))
                (idpath (double_id I₂ (F x)))) ;;2 
      double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
        (idpath (F y)) (FFI y) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trf₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
                (idpath (F x))
                (idpath (double_id I₂ (F x)))) ;;2 
      double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
        (idpath (F y)) (FFI y) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trf₂ (pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
                 (idpath (F x))
                 (idpath (double_id I₂ (F x)))) ;;2 
            double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                              (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                              (FFI y)))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
        (idpath (F y)) (FFI y) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
           (idpath (F x))
           (idpath (double_id I₂ (F x)))) ;;2 double_id_mor
                                                I₂
                                                (# F f) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
           (idpath (F y)) (FFI y))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
        (idpath (F y)) (FFI y) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
           (idpath (F x))
           (idpath (double_id I₂ (F x)))) ;;2 double_id_mor
                                                I₂
                                                (# F f) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
           (idpath (F y)) (FFI y))) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
        (idpath (F y)) (FFI y) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
           (idpath (F x))
           (idpath (double_id I₂ (F x)))) ;;2 double_id_mor
                                                I₂
                                                (# F f) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
           (idpath (F y)) (FFI y))) = ?b

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
     (idpath (double_id I₂ (F x)))) ;;2 double_id_mor
                                          I₂ (# F f) ;;2 
iso_inv_twosided_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y)) (idpath (F y))
     (FFI y)) = ?t2

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
     (idpath (double_id I₂ (F x)))) ;;2 double_id_mor
                                          I₂ (# F f) =
?y'

    apply id_two_disp_left.
  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trb₂ double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                          (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                             (idpath
                                                (F y))
                                             (idpath
                                                (F y))
                                             (FFI y))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
        (idpath (F y)) (FFI y) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

trf₂ (trf₂ double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                          (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                             (idpath
                                                (F y))
                                             (idpath

FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath (F y))
                               (idpath (F y))
                               (! FFI y) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                               (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                               (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                               (FFI y) ;;2 
iso_inv_twosided_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y)) (idpath (F y))
     (FFI y)) = ?t2

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath (F y))
                               (idpath (F y))
                               (! FFI y) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                               (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                               (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                               (FFI y) =
?y'

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                      (idpath (F y))
                                      (idpath (F y))
                                      (! FFI y) ;;2 
                                    idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                      (idpath (F y))
                                      (idpath (F y))
                                      (FFI y))) = 
?y'

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y)) (idpath (F y))
  (! FFI y) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
                  (idpath (F y)) (FFI y) = ?t2

    apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat.
  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 (trb₂ pr1
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (! 
                                                 FFI y @
                                                 FFI y)))) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
           (idpath (F y)) (FFI y))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 (trb₂ pr1
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (double_id
                                                 I₂
                                                 (F y)))))) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
           (idpath (F y)) (FFI y))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 pr1
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (double_id
                                                 I₂
                                                 (F y))))) ;;2 
            iso_inv_twosided_disp
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
                 (idpath (F y)) (FFI y)))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 pr1
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (double_id
                                                 I₂
                                                 (F y)))) ;;2 
                  iso_inv_twosided_disp
                    (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath (F y)) (idpath (F y))
                       (FFI y))))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 pr1
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath
                                           (double_id
                                              I₂ (F y)))) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
           (idpath (F y)) (FFI y))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 pr1
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath
                                           (double_id
                                              I₂ (F y)))) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
           (idpath (F y)) (FFI y))) = ?b
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 pr1
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath
                                           (double_id
                                              I₂ (F y)))) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y))
           (idpath (F y)) (FFI y))) = ?b

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 pr1
                               (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                  (idpath (F y))
                                  (idpath (F y))
                                  (idpath
                                     (double_id I₂
                                        (F y)))) ;;2 
iso_inv_twosided_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F y)) (idpath (F y))
     (FFI y)) = ?t2

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 pr1
                               (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                  (idpath (F y))
                                  (idpath (F y))
                                  (idpath
                                     (double_id I₂
                                        (F y)))) = 
?y'

    apply id_two_disp_right.
  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁

FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trb₂ double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                          (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                             (idpath
                                                (F y))
                                             (idpath
                                                (F y))
                                             (FFI y))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

                                          (idtoiso_twosided_disp

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

                                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
