F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (idpath (F y))
                                        (FFI y)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                               (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                  (idpath (F y))
                                  (idpath (F y))
                                  (FFI y)) =
double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                               (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                  (idpath (F y))
                                  (idpath (F y))
                                  (FFI y))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y)) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
  (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f)


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (idpath (F y))
                                     (! FFI y)) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
  (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trb₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
              (idpath (F x)) (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                             (double_id_mor
                                                I₁ f))) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
  (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
  (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x)) (idpath (F x))
  (! FFI x) ;;2 (#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
isaprop (preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF)


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
isaprop (preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
isPredicate preserves_hor_id_laws
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
∏ x y : preserves_hor_id_data I₁ I₂ FF,
preserves_hor_id_laws x
→ preserves_hor_id_laws y → x = y

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
isPredicate preserves_hor_id_laws
 
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x: preserves_hor_id_data I₁ I₂ FF
isaprop (preserves_hor_id_laws x)

    apply isaprop_preserves_hor_id_laws.
  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
∏ x y : preserves_hor_id_data I₁ I₂ FF,
preserves_hor_id_laws x
→ preserves_hor_id_laws y → x = y
 
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x, y: preserves_hor_id_data I₁ I₂ FF
X: preserves_hor_id_laws x
X0: preserves_hor_id_laws y
x = y

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x, y: preserves_hor_id_data I₁ I₂ FF
X: preserves_hor_id_laws x
X0: preserves_hor_id_laws y
x0: C₁
x x0 = y x0

    apply is_strict_strict_twosided_disp_cat.
Qed.

(** * 4. Preservation of horizontal composition *)
Definition preserves_hor_comp_data
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {D₁ : twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁}
           {D₂ : twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂}
           (Cm₁ : hor_comp D₁)
           (Cm₂ : hor_comp D₂)
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           (FF : twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y z : C₁)
       (f : D₁ x y) (g : D₁ y z),
     FF _ _ (double_hor_comp Cm₁ f g)
     =
     double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF _ _ f) (FF _ _ g).

Definition preserves_hor_comp_laws
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {D₁ : twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁}
           {D₂ : twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂}
           {Cm₁ : hor_comp D₁}
           {Cm₂ : hor_comp D₂}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {FF : twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂}
           (FFC : preserves_hor_comp_data Cm₁ Cm₂ FF)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : C₁)
       (vx : x₁ --> x₂)
       (vy : y₁ --> y₂)
       (vz : z₁ --> z₂)
       (h₁ : D₁ x₁ y₁) (k₁ : D₁ y₁ z₁)
       (h₂ : D₁ x₂ y₂) (k₂ : D₁ y₂ z₂)
       (s₁ : h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy ] h₂)
       (s₂ : k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz ] k₂),
     #2 FF (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)
     ;;2
     idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath _) (idpath _) (FFC x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)
     =
     transportf_disp_mor2
       (id_left _ @ !(id_right _))
       (id_left _ @ !(id_right _))
       (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath _) (idpath _) (FFC x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)
        ;;2
        double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ (#2 FF s₁) (#2 FF s₂)).


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_comp_data Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
isaprop (preserves_hor_comp_laws FFI)


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_comp_data Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
isaprop (preserves_hor_comp_laws FFI)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_comp_data Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
t, t0, t1, t2, t3, t4: C₁
t5: C₁ ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
t6: C₁ ⟦ t1, t2 ⟧
t7: C₁ ⟦ t3, t4 ⟧
t8: D₁ t t1
t9: D₁ t1 t3
t10: D₁ t0 t2
t11: D₁ t2 t4
t12: t8 -->[ t5 ][ t6] t10
t13: t9 -->[ t6 ][ t7] t11
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t13 : t9 -->[ t6 ][ t7] t11,
    (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ t12 t13) ;;2 
    idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F t0))
      (idpath (F t4)) (FFI t0 t2 t4 t10 t11) =
    trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F t))
            (idpath (F t3)) (FFI t t1 t3 t8 t9) ;;2 
          double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) t12)
            ((#2 FF) t13))) t13)

  apply isaset_disp_mor.
Qed.

Definition preserves_hor_comp
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {D₁ : twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁}
           {D₂ : twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂}
           (Cm₁ : hor_comp D₁)
           (Cm₂ : hor_comp D₂)
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           (FF : twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂)
  : UU
  := ∑ (FFC : preserves_hor_comp_data Cm₁ Cm₂ FF),
     preserves_hor_comp_laws FFC.

Definition make_preserves_hor_comp
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {D₁ : twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁}
           {D₂ : twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂}
           (Cm₁ : hor_comp D₁)
           (Cm₂ : hor_comp D₂)
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           (FF : twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂)
           (FFc : preserves_hor_comp_data Cm₁ Cm₂ FF)
           (HFFc : preserves_hor_comp_laws FFc)
  : preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
  := FFc ,, HFFc.

Definition preserves_hor_comp_to_data
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {D₁ : twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁}
           {D₂ : twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂}
           {Cm₁ : hor_comp D₁}
           {Cm₂ : hor_comp D₂}
           {F : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {FF : twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂}
           (FFc : preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF)
           {x y z : C₁}
           (f : D₁ x y) (g : D₁ y z)
  : FF _ _ (double_hor_comp Cm₁ f g)
    =
    double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF _ _ f) (FF _ _ g)
  := pr1 FFc x y z f g.

Coercion preserves_hor_comp_to_data : preserves_hor_comp >-> Funclass.


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                              (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                              (FFc x₂
                                                 y₂ z₂
                                                 h₂ k₂) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                                 Cm₂
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₁)
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₂))


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                              (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                              (FFc x₂
                                                 y₂ z₂
                                                 h₂ k₂) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                                 Cm₂
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₁)
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₂))

  exact (pr2 FFc x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ vx vy vz h₁ k₁ h₂ k₂ s₁ s₂).
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F z₁))
  (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
                             ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂)


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F z₁))
  (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
                             ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
            double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂))) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F z₁))
  (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
                             ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F z₁))
  (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
                             ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F z₁))
  (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂
                             ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F z₁))
  (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                               (double_hor_comp_mor
                                  Cm₁ s₁ s₂) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))


C₁, C₂: category

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F z₁))
  (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                               (double_hor_comp_mor
                                  Cm₁ s₁ s₂) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
      id_two_disp
        (FF x₂ z₂ (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (idpath (F x₂))
                                 (idpath (F z₂))
                                 (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
      id_two_disp
        (FF x₂ z₂ (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h₂ k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
      id_two_disp
        (FF x₂ z₂ (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h₂ k₂))) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
?b =
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (idpath (F x₂))
                                 (idpath (F z₂))
                                 (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
      id_two_disp
        (FF x₂ z₂ (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h₂ k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
      id_two_disp
        (FF x₂ z₂ (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h₂ k₂))) = 
?b

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
id_two_disp (FF x₂ z₂ (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h₂ k₂)) =
?t2

    exact (inv_after_iso_twosided_disp_alt
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath _) (idpath _) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))).
  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
               (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
             iso_inv_twosided_disp
               (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                  (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))))) =
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (idpath (F x₂))
                                 (idpath (F z₂))
                                 (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
      id_two_disp
        (FF x₂ z₂ (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h₂ k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
            (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
            (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
               (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
             iso_inv_twosided_disp
               (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                  (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))))) =
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (idpath (F x₂))
                                 (idpath (F z₂))
                                 (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
      id_two_disp
        (FF x₂ z₂ (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h₂ k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
         (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
       iso_inv_twosided_disp
         (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
            (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))) =
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (idpath (F x₂))
                                 (idpath (F z₂))
                                 (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
      id_two_disp
        (FF x₂ z₂ (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h₂ k₂)))

                                 (idpath (F x₂))
                                 (idpath (F z₂))

k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂

                                 (idpath (F x₂))
                                 (idpath (F z₂))
                                 (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
      id_two_disp
        (FF x₂ z₂ (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h₂ k₂))) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
         (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
       iso_inv_twosided_disp
         (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
            (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (idpath (F x₂))
                                 (idpath (F z₂))
                                 (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
      id_two_disp
        (FF x₂ z₂ (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h₂ k₂))) = 
?b

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
id_two_disp (FF x₂ z₂ (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h₂ k₂)) =
?t2

    exact (inv_after_iso_twosided_disp_alt
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath _) (idpath _) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))).
  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (idpath (F x₂))
                                 (idpath (F z₂))
                                 (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
               (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
             iso_inv_twosided_disp
               (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                  (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
         (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
       iso_inv_twosided_disp
         (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
            (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF

vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
                    ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                       (idpath (F x₂))
                                       (idpath (F z₂))
                                       (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂
                                            h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
            (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
               (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
             iso_inv_twosided_disp
               (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                  (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
         (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
       iso_inv_twosided_disp
         (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
            (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
                    ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                       (idpath (F x₂))
                                       (idpath (F z₂))
                                       (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂
                                            h₂ k₂) ;;2 
                  (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                     (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F z₂))
                     (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
         (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
       iso_inv_twosided_disp
         (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
            (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))))

         (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁

vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂))) =
?b
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
?b =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂))) =
?b

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F z₁))
  (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                               (double_hor_comp_mor
                                  Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂) ;;2 
iso_inv_twosided_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
     (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) = ?t2

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F z₁))
  (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 (#2 FF)
                               (double_hor_comp_mor
                                  Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂) =
?y'

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
       idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
         (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) = 
?y'

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                              (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                              (FFc x₂
                                                 y₂ z₂
                                                 h₂ k₂) =
?t2

    apply is_natural_preserves_hor_comp.
  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
            (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                     (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F z₁))
                     (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                                Cm₂
                                                ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₁)
                                                ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₂)))) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁

k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                    (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F z₁))
                    (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₁))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₁))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₁ y₁
                                                 z₁ h₁
                                                 k₁) ;;2 
                                                double_hor_comp_mor
                                                 Cm₂
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₁)
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₂)))) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁

k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                    (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F z₁))
                    (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₁))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₁))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₁ y₁
                                                 z₁ h₁
                                                 k₁) ;;2 
                                                double_hor_comp_mor
                                                 Cm₂
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₁)
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₂)) ;;2 
                  iso_inv_twosided_disp
                    (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F z₂))
                       (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁

k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
         (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
       double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
         ((#2 FF) s₂)) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                             (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                (idpath (F x₂))
                                (idpath (F z₂))
                                (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trb₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
            double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂)) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                  (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F x₂))
                                     (idpath (F z₂))
                                     (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂
                                        k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
            double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂)) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                  (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F x₂))
                                     (idpath (F z₂))
                                     (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂
                                        k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
              (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
            double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                    (idpath (F x₂))
                                    (idpath (F z₂))
                                    (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂
                                       k₂)))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                                 Cm₂
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₁)
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₂) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                                 Cm₂
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₁)
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₂) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
?b =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                                 Cm₂
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₁)
                                                 ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₂) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) = 
?b

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F z₁))
  (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath (F x₁))
                               (idpath (F z₁))
                               (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
iso_inv_twosided_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
     (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) = ?t2

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁)) (idpath (F z₁))
  (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath (F x₁))
                               (idpath (F z₁))
                               (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) =
?y'

    apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat.
  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                (idpath (F z₁))
                (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁ @
                 FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                            Cm₂
                                            ((#2 FF)
                                               s₁)
                                            ((#2 FF)
                                               s₂) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                (idpath (F z₁))
                (idpath
                   (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
                      (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)))) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                             Cm₂
                                             ((#2 FF)
                                                s₁)
                                             ((#2 FF)
                                                s₂) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                (idpath (F z₁))
                (idpath
                   (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
                      (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)))) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                             Cm₂
                                             ((#2 FF)
                                                s₁)
                                             ((#2 FF)
                                                s₂) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                 (idpath (F z₁))
                 (idpath
                    (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
                       (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)))) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                              Cm₂
                                              ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₁)
                                              ((#2 FF)
                                                 s₂) ;;2 
            iso_inv_twosided_disp
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
           (idpath (F z₁))
           (idpath
              (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
                 (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)))) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                        Cm₂
                                        ((#2 FF) s₁)
                                        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
           (idpath (F z₁))
           (idpath
              (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
                 (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)))) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                        Cm₂
                                        ((#2 FF) s₁)
                                        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
?b =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
           (idpath (F z₁))
           (idpath
              (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
                 (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)))) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                        Cm₂
                                        ((#2 FF) s₁)
                                        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) = 
?b

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
     (idpath (F z₁))
     (idpath
        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)))) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                  Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
                                  ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
iso_inv_twosided_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
     (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) = ?t2

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
     (idpath (F z₁))
     (idpath
        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)))) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                  Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
                                  ((#2 FF) s₂) = ?y'

    apply id_two_disp_left.
  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trb₂ double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
             ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                   (idpath (F x₂))
                                   (idpath (F z₂))
                                   (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)))

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
             ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                   (idpath (F x₂))
                                   (idpath (F z₂))
                                   (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath

                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂

vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp

                                    (idpath (F z₂))

                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
