C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
?b =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                           (idpath (F x₂))
                           (idpath (F z₂))
                           (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
        (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂))) =
?b

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F z₂))
  (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath (F x₂))
                               (idpath (F z₂))
                               (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
iso_inv_twosided_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
     (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) = ?t2

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F z₂))
  (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath (F x₂))
                               (idpath (F z₂))
                               (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) =
?y'

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                            (idpath (F x₂))
                            (idpath (F z₂))
                            (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 
                          idtoiso_twosided_disp
                            (idpath (F x₂))
                            (idpath (F z₂))
                            (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
?y'

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F z₂))
  (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                               (idpath (F x₂))
                               (idpath (F z₂))
                               (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) =
?t2

    apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat.
  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 (trb₂ pr1
                                       (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                          (idpath
                                             (F x₂))
                                          (idpath
                                             (F z₂))
                                          (! FFc x₂ y₂
                                               z₂ h₂
                                               k₂ @
                                           FFc x₂ y₂
                                             z₂ h₂ k₂)))) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 (trb₂ pr1
                                       (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                          (idpath
                                             (F x₂))
                                          (idpath
                                             (F z₂))
                                          (idpath
                                             (double_hor_comp
                                                Cm₂
                                                (FF x₂
                                                 y₂ h₂)
                                                (FF y₂
                                                 z₂ k₂)))))) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))

FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF

vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁

k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂

              ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 (trf₂ pr1
                                       (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                          (idpath

                                          (idpath

                                                Cm₂
                                                (FF x₂
                                                 y₂ h₂)
                                                (FF y₂
                                                 z₂ k₂)))))) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))

                              (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))

D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 (trf₂ pr1
                                       (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                          (idpath
                                             (F x₂))
                                          (idpath
                                             (F z₂))
                                          (idpath
                                             (double_hor_comp
                                                Cm₂
                                                (FF x₂
                                                 y₂ h₂)
                                                (FF y₂
                                                 z₂ k₂))))) ;;2 
            iso_inv_twosided_disp
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
                    ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 pr1
                                       (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                          (idpath
                                             (F x₂))
                                          (idpath
                                             (F z₂))
                                          (idpath
                                             (double_hor_comp
                                                Cm₂
                                                (FF x₂
                                                 y₂ h₂)
                                                (FF y₂
                                                 z₂ k₂))))) ;;2 
            iso_inv_twosided_disp
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
                    ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 pr1
                                       (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                          (idpath
                                             (F x₂))
                                          (idpath
                                             (F z₂))
                                          (idpath
                                             (double_hor_comp
                                                Cm₂
                                                (FF x₂
                                                 y₂ h₂)
                                                (FF y₂
                                                 z₂ k₂)))) ;;2 
                  iso_inv_twosided_disp
                    (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                       (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F z₂))
                       (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 pr1
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (idpath
                                 (double_hor_comp Cm₂
                                    (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
                                    (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)))) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 pr1
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (idpath
                                 (double_hor_comp Cm₂
                                    (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
                                    (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)))) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
?b =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 pr1
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (idpath
                                 (double_hor_comp Cm₂
                                    (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
                                    (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)))) ;;2 
      iso_inv_twosided_disp
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) = 
?b

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
     (idpath (F z₂))
     (idpath
        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
           (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)))) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                  (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath (F x₂))
                                     (idpath (F z₂))
                                     (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂
                                        k₂)) = ?t2

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
     (idpath (F z₂))
     (idpath
        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
           (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)))) = ?y'

    apply id_two_disp_right.
  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trb₂ double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
             ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                   (idpath (F x₂))
                                   (idpath (F z₂))
                                   (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))

D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
             ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                   (idpath (F x₂))
                                   (idpath (F z₂))
                                   (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))

D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                    (idpath (F x₂))
                                    (idpath (F z₂))
                                    (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂
                                       k₂)))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
        ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 iso_inv_twosided_disp
                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                              (idpath (F x₂))
                              (idpath (F z₂))
                              (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
iso_inv_twosided_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
     (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) =
double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
iso_inv_twosided_disp
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
     (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)) =
double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F z₂))
  (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
        (idpath (F z₁)) (! FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
      (#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)) =
double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F z₂))
  (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
              ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                 (idpath (F x₂))
                                 (idpath (F z₂))
                                 (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) =
double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F z₂))
  (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F z₂))
  (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) =
double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂)) (idpath (F z₂))
  (! FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
isaprop (preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF)


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
isaprop (preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
isPredicate preserves_hor_comp_laws
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
∏ x y : preserves_hor_comp_data Cm₁ Cm₂ FF,
preserves_hor_comp_laws x
→ preserves_hor_comp_laws y → x = y

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
isPredicate preserves_hor_comp_laws
 
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x: preserves_hor_comp_data Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
isaprop (preserves_hor_comp_laws x)

    apply isaprop_preserves_hor_comp_laws.
  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
∏ x y : preserves_hor_comp_data Cm₁ Cm₂ FF,
preserves_hor_comp_laws x
→ preserves_hor_comp_laws y → x = y
 
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x, y: preserves_hor_comp_data Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
X: preserves_hor_comp_laws x
X0: preserves_hor_comp_laws y
x = y

    
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: strict_twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
x, y: preserves_hor_comp_data Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
X: preserves_hor_comp_laws x
X0: preserves_hor_comp_laws y
x0, x1, x2: C₁
x3: D₁ x0 x1
x4: D₁ x1 x2
x x0 x1 x2 x3 x4 = y x0 x1 x2 x3 x4

    apply is_strict_strict_twosided_disp_cat.
Qed.

(** * 5. The identity preserves identities and composition *)

C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
preserves_hor_id_data I I
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D)


C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
preserves_hor_id_data I I
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D)

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
x: C
double_id I x = double_id I x

  apply idpath.
Defined.


C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
preserves_hor_id_laws
  (identity_preserves_hor_id_data I)


C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
preserves_hor_id_laws
  (identity_preserves_hor_id_data I)

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
double_id_mor I f ;;2 id_two_disp (double_id I y) =
trf₂ (id_two_disp (double_id I x) ;;2 double_id_mor I
                                        f)

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
trb₂ double_id_mor I f = trf₂ (trb₂ double_id_mor I f)

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ double_id_mor I f = trf₂ (trf₂ double_id_mor I f)

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ double_id_mor I f = trf₂ double_id_mor I f

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
double_id_mor I f = double_id_mor I f

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
preserves_hor_id I I
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D)


C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
preserves_hor_id I I
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D)

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
preserves_hor_id_data I I
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D)
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
preserves_hor_id_laws ?FFI

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
preserves_hor_id_data I I
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D)
 exact (identity_preserves_hor_id_data I).
  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
I: hor_id D
preserves_hor_id_laws
  (identity_preserves_hor_id_data I)
 exact (identity_preserves_hor_id_laws I).
Defined.


C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
preserves_hor_comp_data Cm Cm
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D)


C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
preserves_hor_comp_data Cm Cm
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D)

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
x, y, z: C
f: D x y
g: D y z
twosided_disp_functor_identity D x z
  (double_hor_comp Cm f g) =
double_hor_comp Cm
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D x y f)
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D y z g)

  apply idpath.
Defined.


C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
preserves_hor_comp_laws
  (identity_preserves_hor_comp_data Cm)


C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
preserves_hor_comp_laws
  (identity_preserves_hor_comp_data Cm)

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D x₁ y₁
k₁: D y₁ z₁
h₂: D x₂ y₂
k₂: D y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
double_hor_comp_mor Cm s₁ s₂ ;;2 id_two_disp
                                   (double_hor_comp Cm
                                      h₂ k₂) =
trf₂ (id_two_disp (double_hor_comp Cm h₁ k₁) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                                 Cm s₁
                                                 s₂)

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D x₁ y₁
k₁: D y₁ z₁
h₂: D x₂ y₂
k₂: D y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ double_hor_comp_mor Cm s₁ s₂ =
trf₂ (trb₂ double_hor_comp_mor Cm s₁ s₂)

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D x₁ y₁
k₁: D y₁ z₁
h₂: D x₂ y₂
k₂: D y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ double_hor_comp_mor Cm s₁ s₂ =
trf₂ (trf₂ double_hor_comp_mor Cm s₁ s₂)

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D x₁ y₁
k₁: D y₁ z₁
h₂: D x₂ y₂
k₂: D y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ double_hor_comp_mor Cm s₁ s₂ =
trf₂ double_hor_comp_mor Cm s₁ s₂

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C
vx: C ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D x₁ y₁
k₁: D y₁ z₁
h₂: D x₂ y₂
k₂: D y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
double_hor_comp_mor Cm s₁ s₂ =
double_hor_comp_mor Cm s₁ s₂

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
preserves_hor_comp Cm Cm
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D)


C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
preserves_hor_comp Cm Cm
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D)

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
preserves_hor_comp_data Cm Cm
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D)
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
preserves_hor_comp_laws ?FFc

  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
preserves_hor_comp_data Cm Cm
  (twosided_disp_functor_identity D)
 exact (identity_preserves_hor_comp_data Cm).
  
C: category
D: twosided_disp_cat C C
Cm: hor_comp D
preserves_hor_comp_laws
  (identity_preserves_hor_comp_data Cm)
 exact (identity_preserves_hor_comp_laws Cm).
Defined.

(** * 6. The composition preserves identities and composition *)

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
preserves_hor_id_data I₁ I₃
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
preserves_hor_id_data I₁ I₃
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x: C₁
GG (F x) (F x) (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)) =
double_id I₃ (G (F x))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x: C₁
GG (F x) (F x) (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)) =
GG (F x) (F x) (double_id I₂ (F x))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x: C₁
FF x x (double_id I₁ x) = double_id I₂ (F x)

  apply (FFI x).
Defined.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
preserves_hor_id_laws
  (composition_preserves_hor_id_data FFI GGI)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
preserves_hor_id_laws
  (composition_preserves_hor_id_data FFI GGI)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
(#2 GG) ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                             (idpath
                                                (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                             (idpath
                                                (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                             (composition_preserves_hor_id_data
                                                FFI
                                                GGI y) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (composition_preserves_hor_id_data FFI GGI x) ;;2 
      double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
(#2 GG) ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                             (idpath
                                                (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                             (idpath
                                                (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                             (maponpaths
                                                (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F y))
                                                (FFI y) @
                                              GGI
                                                (F y)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
(#2 GG) ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                             (idpath
                                                (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                             (idpath
                                                (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                             (maponpaths
                                                (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F y))
                                                (FFI y) @
                                              GGI
                                                (F y)) =
?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
(#2 GG) ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                             (idpath
                                                (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                             (idpath
                                                (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                             (maponpaths
                                                (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F y))
                                                (FFI y) @
                                              GGI
                                                (F y)) =
?b

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F y)))
  (idpath (G (F y)))
  (maponpaths (GG (F y) (F y)) (FFI y) @ GGI (F y)) =
?t2

    apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat'.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
(#2 GG) ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f)) ;;2 (trf₂ (pr1
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                                 (maponpaths
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (FFI
                                                 y))) ;;2 
                                                 pr1
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                                 (GGI
                                                 (F y))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f)) ;;2 (pr1
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                                 (maponpaths
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (FFI
                                                 y))) ;;2 
                                                 pr1
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                                 (GGI
                                                 (F y))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trb₂ ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f)) ;;2 
            pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                 (idpath (G (F y))) (idpath (G (F y)))
                 (maponpaths (GG (F y) (F y)) (FFI y))) ;;2 
            pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                 (idpath (G (F y))) (idpath (G (F y)))
                 (GGI (F y))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trf₂ ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f)) ;;2 
            pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                 (idpath (G (F y))) (idpath (G (F y)))
                 (maponpaths (GG (F y) (F y)) (FFI y))) ;;2 
            pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                 (idpath (G (F y))) (idpath (G (F y)))
                 (GGI (F y))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))

I₁: hor_id D₁

FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f)) ;;2 pr1
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                                 (maponpaths
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F y))
                                                 (FFI
                                                 y))) ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F y)))
           (idpath (G (F y))) (GGI (F y)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))

         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F y))

                                                 y))) ;;2

                                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃

FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                            (idpath
                                               (F y))
                                            (idpath
                                               (F y))
                                            (FFI y)) ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F y)))
           (idpath (G (F y))) (GGI (F y)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                            (idpath
                                               (F y))
                                            (idpath
                                               (F y))
                                            (FFI y)) ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F y)))
           (idpath (G (F y))) (GGI (F y)))) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                            (idpath
                                               (F y))
                                            (idpath
                                               (F y))
                                            (FFI y)) ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F y)))
           (idpath (G (F y))) (GGI (F y)))) = ?b

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
(#2 GG)
  ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                      (idpath (F y))
                                      (idpath (F y))
                                      (FFI y)) ;;2 
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F y)))
     (idpath (G (F y))) (GGI (F y))) = ?t2

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
(#2 GG)
  ((#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                      (idpath (F y))
                                      (idpath (F y))
                                      (FFI y)) = ?y'

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
(#2 FF) (double_id_mor I₁ f) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                   (idpath (F y))
                                   (idpath (F y))
                                   (FFI y) = ?t2

    apply is_natural_preserves_hor_id.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
                 (idpath (F x)) (FFI x) ;;2 double_id_mor
                                              I₂
                                              (# F f))) ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F y)))
           (idpath (G (F y))) (GGI (F y)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trf₂ (#2 GG)
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
                (idpath (F x)) (FFI x) ;;2 double_id_mor
                                             I₂
                                             (# F f)) ;;2

        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
           (idpath (F x)) (FFI x) ;;2 double_id_mor I₂
                                        (# F f)) ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F y)))
           (idpath (G (F y))) (GGI (F y)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃

I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trb₂ ((#2 GG)
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
                 (idpath (F x)) (FFI x)) ;;2 (#2 GG)
                                               (double_id_mor
                                                 I₂
                                                 (# F
                                                 f))) ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F y)))
           (idpath (G (F y))) (GGI (F y)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂

GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
           (idpath (F x)) (FFI x)) ;;2 ((#2 GG)
                                          (double_id_mor
                                             I₂
                                             (# F f)) ;;2 
                                        pr1
                                          (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                             (idpath
                                                (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                             (idpath
                                                (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                             (GGI
                                                (F y))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
           (idpath (F x)) (FFI x)) ;;2 ((#2 GG)
                                          (double_id_mor
                                             I₂
                                             (# F f)) ;;2 
                                        pr1
                                          (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                             (idpath
                                                (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                             (idpath
                                                (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                             (GGI
                                                (F y))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
           (idpath (F x)) (FFI x)) ;;2 ((#2 GG)
                                          (double_id_mor
                                             I₂
                                             (# F f)) ;;2 
                                        pr1
                                          (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                             (idpath
                                                (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                             (idpath
                                                (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                             (GGI
                                                (F y))))) =
?b

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
(#2 GG) (double_id_mor I₂ (# F f)) ;;2 pr1
                                         (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                            (idpath
                                               (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                            (idpath
                                               (G
                                                 (F y)))
                                            (GGI (F y))) =
?t2

    apply is_natural_preserves_hor_id.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
           (idpath (F x)) (FFI x)) ;;2 (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x)))
                                                (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x)))
                                                (GGI
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
                                              double_id_mor
                                                I₃
                                                (# G
                                                 (# F
                                                 f))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x))
           (idpath (F x)) (FFI x)) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath
                                            (G (F x)))
                                         (idpath
                                            (G (F x)))
                                         (GGI (F x)) ;;2 
      double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
                (idpath (G (F x)))
                (maponpaths
                   (λ xy : D₂ (F x) (F x),
                    GG (F x) (F x) xy) (FFI x))) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x))) (GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor
                                             I₃
                                             (# G
                                                (# F f))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trf₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
                (idpath (G (F x)))
                (maponpaths
                   (λ xy : D₂ (F x) (F x),
                    GG (F x) (F x) xy) (FFI x))) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x))) (GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor
                                             I₃
                                             (# G
                                                (# F f))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trf₂ (pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                 (idpath (G (F x))) (idpath (G (F x)))
                 (maponpaths
                    (λ xy : D₂ (F x) (F x),
                     GG (F x) (F x) xy) (FFI x))) ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
              (idpath (G (F x))) (GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor
                                                 I₃
                                                 (# G
                                                 (# F
                                                 f)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

I₃: hor_id D₃

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
           (idpath (G (F x)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ xy : D₂ (F x) (F x),
               GG (F x) (F x) xy) (FFI x))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x)))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x)))
                                                 (GGI
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
      double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG

f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
           (idpath (G (F x)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ xy : D₂ (F x) (F x),
               GG (F x) (F x) xy) (FFI x))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath

                                                 (F x)))

                                                 (F x)))
                                                 (GGI
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
      double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f))) = ?b

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
           (idpath (G (F x)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ xy : D₂ (F x) (F x),
               GG (F x) (F x) xy) (FFI x))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x)))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x)))
                                                 (GGI
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
      double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f))) = ?b

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
     (idpath (G (F x)))
     (maponpaths
        (λ xy : D₂ (F x) (F x), GG (F x) (F x) xy)
        (FFI x))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                        (idpath (G (F x)))
                        (idpath (G (F x))) (GGI (F x)) ;;2 
double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)) = ?t2

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
     (idpath (G (F x)))
     (maponpaths
        (λ xy : D₂ (F x) (F x), GG (F x) (F x) xy)
        (FFI x))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                        (idpath (G (F x)))
                        (idpath (G (F x))) (GGI (F x)) =
?y'

    apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
                (idpath (G (F x)))
                (maponpaths
                   (λ xy : D₂ (F x) (F x),
                    GG (F x) (F x) xy) (FFI x) @
                 GGI (F x))) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃
                                   (# G (# F f))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trf₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
                (idpath (G (F x)))
                (maponpaths
                   (λ xy : D₂ (F x) (F x),
                    GG (F x) (F x) xy) (FFI x) @
                 GGI (F x))) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃
                                   (# G (# F f))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

I₂: hor_id D₂

GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (trf₂ (pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                 (idpath (G (F x))) (idpath (G (F x)))
                 (maponpaths
                    (λ xy : D₂ (F x) (F x),
                     GG (F x) (F x) xy) (FFI x) @

                                    (# G (# F f)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
           (idpath (G (F x)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ xy : D₂ (F x) (F x),
               GG (F x) (F x) xy) (FFI x) @ GGI (F x))) ;;2 
      double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
        (idpath (G (F x)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @
         GGI (F x)) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
x, y: C₁
f: C₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
     (idpath (G (F x)))
     (maponpaths
        (λ xy : D₂ (F x) (F x), GG (F x) (F x) xy)
        (FFI x) @ GGI (F x))) ;;2 double_id_mor I₃
                                    (# G (# F f)) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x)))
  (idpath (G (F x)))
  (maponpaths (GG (F x) (F x)) (FFI x) @ GGI (F x)) ;;2 
double_id_mor I₃ (# G (# F f))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
preserves_hor_id I₁ I₃
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
preserves_hor_id I₁ I₃
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
