I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
preserves_hor_id_data I₁ I₃
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
preserves_hor_id_laws ?FFI

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
preserves_hor_id_data I₁ I₃
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG)
 exact (composition_preserves_hor_id_data FFI GGI).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFI: preserves_hor_id I₁ I₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGI: preserves_hor_id I₂ I₃ GG
preserves_hor_id_laws
  (composition_preserves_hor_id_data FFI GGI)
 exact (composition_preserves_hor_id_laws FFI GGI).
Defined.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
preserves_hor_comp_data Cm₁ Cm₃
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
preserves_hor_comp_data Cm₁ Cm₃
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x, y, z: C₁
f: D₁ x y
g: D₁ y z
GG (F x) (F z) (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ f g)) =
double_hor_comp Cm₃ (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y f))
  (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z g))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x, y, z: C₁
f: D₁ x y
g: D₁ y z
GG (F x) (F z) (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ f g)) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x, y, z: C₁
f: D₁ x y
g: D₁ y z
?b =
double_hor_comp Cm₃ (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y f))
  (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z g))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x, y, z: C₁
f: D₁ x y
g: D₁ y z
GG (F x) (F z) (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ f g)) = ?b

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x, y, z: C₁
f: D₁ x y
g: D₁ y z
FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ f g) = ?t2

    exact (FFc x y z f g).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x, y, z: C₁
f: D₁ x y
g: D₁ y z
GG (F x) (F z)
  (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x y f) (FF y z g)) =
double_hor_comp Cm₃ (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y f))
  (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z g))

  exact (GGc (F x) (F y) (F z) (FF x y f) (FF y z g)).
Defined.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
preserves_hor_comp_laws
  (composition_preserves_hor_comp_data FFc GGc)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
preserves_hor_comp_laws
  (composition_preserves_hor_comp_data FFc GGc)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(#2 (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG))
  (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath
                                           ((F ∙ G) x₂))
                                        (idpath
                                           ((F ∙ G) z₂))
                                        (composition_preserves_hor_comp_data
                                           FFc GGc x₂
                                           y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath ((F ∙ G) x₁))
        (idpath ((F ∙ G) z₁))
        (composition_preserves_hor_comp_data FFc GGc
           x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                 ((#2 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                         FF GG)) s₁)
                                 ((#2 (comp_twosided_disp_functor
                                         FF GG)) s₂))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(#2 GG) ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
  (idpath (G (F z₂)))
  (composition_preserves_hor_comp_data FFc GGc x₂ y₂
     z₂ h₂ k₂) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (composition_preserves_hor_comp_data FFc GGc
           x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                 ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                 ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(#2 GG) ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
  (idpath (G (F z₂)))
  (maponpaths (GG (F x₂) (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) @
   GGc (F x₂) (F y₂) (F z₂) (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
     (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(#2 GG) ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
  (idpath (G (F z₂)))
  (maponpaths (GG (F x₂) (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) @
   GGc (F x₂) (F y₂) (F z₂) (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
     (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(#2 GG) ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)) ;;2 
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
  (idpath (G (F z₂)))
  (maponpaths (GG (F x₂) (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) @
   GGc (F x₂) (F y₂) (F z₂) (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
     (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)) = ?b

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
  (idpath (G (F z₂)))
  (maponpaths (GG (F x₂) (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) @
   GGc (F x₂) (F y₂) (F z₂) (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
     (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)) = ?t2

    apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat'.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(#2 GG) ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)) ;;2 
(trf₂ (pr1
         (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
            (idpath (G (F z₂)))
            (maponpaths (GG (F x₂) (F z₂))
               (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) ;;2 pr1
                                            (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                               (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂)))
                                               (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F z₂)))
                                               (GGc
                                                 (F x₂)
                                                 (F y₂)
                                                 (F z₂)
                                                 (FF
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 h₂)
                                                 (FF
                                                 y₂ z₂
                                                 k₂))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)) ;;2 
      (pr1
         (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
            (idpath (G (F z₂)))
            (maponpaths (GG (F x₂) (F z₂))
               (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) ;;2 pr1
                                            (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                               (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂)))
                                               (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F z₂)))
                                               (GGc
                                                 (F x₂)
                                                 (F y₂)
                                                 (F z₂)
                                                 (FF
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 h₂)
                                                 (FF
                                                 y₂ z₂
                                                 k₂))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trb₂ ((#2 GG)
              ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)) ;;2 
            pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                 (idpath (G (F x₂)))
                 (idpath (G (F z₂)))
                 (maponpaths (GG (F x₂) (F z₂))
                    (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) ;;2 pr1
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂)))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F z₂)))
                                                 (GGc
                                                 (F x₂)
                                                 (F y₂)
                                                 (F z₂)
                                                 (FF
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 h₂)
                                                 (FF
                                                 y₂ z₂
                                                 k₂))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ ((#2 GG)
              ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)) ;;2 
            pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                 (idpath (G (F x₂)))
                 (idpath (G (F z₂)))
                 (maponpaths (GG (F x₂) (F z₂))
                    (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) ;;2 pr1
                                                 (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂)))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F z₂)))
                                                 (GGc
                                                 (F x₂)
                                                 (F y₂)
                                                 (F z₂)
                                                 (FF
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 h₂)
                                                 (FF
                                                 y₂ z₂
                                                 k₂))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)) ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
           (idpath (G (F z₂)))
           (maponpaths (GG (F x₂) (F z₂))
              (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) ;;2 pr1
                                           (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₂)))
                                              (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F z₂)))
                                              (GGc
                                                 (F x₂)
                                                 (F y₂)
                                                 (F z₂)
                                                 (FF
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 h₂)
                                                 (FF
                                                 y₂ z₂
                                                 k₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (#2 GG)
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
           (idpath (G (F z₂)))
           (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂) (F z₂) (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
              (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ ((#2 GG)
              ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)) ;;2 
            (#2 GG)
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂))) ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
           (idpath (G (F z₂)))
           (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂) (F z₂) (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
              (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ ((#2 GG)
              ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)) ;;2 
            (#2 GG)
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
            pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                 (idpath (G (F x₂)))
                 (idpath (G (F z₂)))
                 (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂) (F z₂)
                    (FF x₂ y₂ h₂) (FF y₂ z₂ k₂))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁

k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂)) ;;2 
      (#2 GG)
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
           (idpath (G (F z₂)))
           (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂) (F z₂) (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
              (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (#2 GG)
             ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
              idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
           (idpath (G (F z₂)))
           (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂) (F z₂) (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
              (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁

k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ ((#2 GG)
              ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
               idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
                 (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
            pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                 (idpath (G (F x₂)))
                 (idpath (G (F z₂)))
                 (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂) (F z₂)
                    (FF x₂ y₂ h₂) (FF y₂ z₂ k₂))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

Cm₂: hor_comp D₂

vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁

k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
         idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
           (idpath (G (F z₂)))
           (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂) (F z₂) (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
              (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁

k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
         idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
           (idpath (G (F z₂)))
           (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂) (F z₂) (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
              (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)))) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 
         idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₂))
           (idpath (F z₂)) (FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) ;;2 
      pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
           (idpath (G (F z₂)))
           (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂) (F z₂) (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
              (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)))) = ?b

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(#2 GG)
  ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)) ;;2 
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
     (idpath (G (F z₂)))
     (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂) (F z₂) (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
        (FF y₂ z₂ k₂))) = ?t2

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(#2 GG)
  ((#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                                 (FFc
                                                 x₂ y₂
                                                 z₂ h₂
                                                 k₂)) =
?y'

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(#2 FF) (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₁ s₁ s₂) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                              (idpath
                                                 (F x₂))
                                              (idpath
                                                 (F z₂))
                                              (FFc x₂
                                                 y₂ z₂
                                                 h₂ k₂) =
?t2

    apply is_natural_preserves_hor_comp.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                 (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
               double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
                 ((#2 FF) s₂))) ;;2 pr1
                                      (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath
                                            (G (F x₂)))
                                         (idpath
                                            (G (F z₂)))
                                         (GGc (F x₂)
                                            (F y₂)
                                            (F z₂)
                                            (FF x₂ y₂
                                               h₂)
                                            (FF y₂ z₂
                                               k₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (#2 GG)
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
              double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
                ((#2 FF) s₂)) ;;2 pr1
                                    (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                       (idpath
                                          (G (F x₂)))
                                       (idpath
                                          (G (F z₂)))
                                       (GGc (F x₂)
                                          (F y₂)
                                          (F z₂)
                                          (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
                                          (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ ((#2 GG)
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                 (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
               double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
                 ((#2 FF) s₂)) ;;2 pr1
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath
                                           (G (F x₂)))
                                        (idpath
                                           (G (F z₂)))
                                        (GGc (F x₂)
                                           (F y₂)
                                           (F z₂)
                                           (FF x₂ y₂
                                              h₂)
                                           (FF y₂ z₂
                                              k₂))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
           (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) ;;2 
         double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
           ((#2 FF) s₂)) ;;2 pr1
                               (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                  (idpath (G (F x₂)))
                                  (idpath (G (F z₂)))
                                  (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂)
                                     (F z₂)
                                     (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
                                     (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trb₂ ((#2 GG)
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                 (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)) ;;2 
            (#2 GG)
              (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
                 ((#2 FF) s₂))) ;;2 pr1
                                      (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath
                                            (G (F x₂)))
                                         (idpath
                                            (G (F z₂)))
                                         (GGc (F x₂)
                                            (F y₂)
                                            (F z₂)
                                            (FF x₂ y₂
                                               h₂)
                                            (FF y₂ z₂
                                               k₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG

vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ ((#2 GG)
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                 (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)) ;;2 
            (#2 GG)
              (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
                 ((#2 FF) s₂))) ;;2 pr1
                                      (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath
                                            (G (F x₂)))
                                         (idpath
                                            (G (F z₂)))
                                         (GGc (F x₂)
                                            (F y₂)
                                            (F z₂)
                                            (FF x₂ y₂
                                               h₂)
                                            (FF y₂ z₂
                                               k₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ ((#2 GG)
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                 (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)) ;;2 
            (#2 GG)
              (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
                 ((#2 FF) s₂)) ;;2 pr1
                                     (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                        (idpath
                                           (G (F x₂)))
                                        (idpath
                                           (G (F z₂)))
                                        (GGc (F x₂)
                                           (F y₂)
                                           (F z₂)
                                           (FF x₂ y₂
                                              h₂)
                                           (FF y₂ z₂
                                              k₂))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
           (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)) ;;2 
      (#2 GG)
        (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
           ((#2 FF) s₂)) ;;2 pr1
                               (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                  (idpath (G (F x₂)))
                                  (idpath (G (F z₂)))
                                  (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂)
                                     (F z₂)
                                     (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
                                     (FF y₂ z₂ k₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ ((#2 GG)
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                 (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)) ;;2 
            ((#2 GG)
               (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
                  ((#2 FF) s₂)) ;;2 pr1
                                      (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                         (idpath
                                            (G (F x₂)))
                                         (idpath
                                            (G (F z₂)))
                                         (GGc (F x₂)
                                            (F y₂)
                                            (F z₂)
                                            (FF x₂ y₂
                                               h₂)
                                            (FF y₂ z₂
                                               k₂)))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
           (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)) ;;2 
      ((#2 GG)
         (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
            ((#2 FF) s₂)) ;;2 pr1
                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                   (idpath (G (F x₂)))
                                   (idpath (G (F z₂)))
                                   (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂)
                                      (F z₂)
                                      (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
                                      (FF y₂ z₂ k₂))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
           (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)) ;;2 
      ((#2 GG)
         (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
            ((#2 FF) s₂)) ;;2 pr1
                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                   (idpath (G (F x₂)))
                                   (idpath (G (F z₂)))
                                   (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂)
                                      (F z₂)
                                      (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
                                      (FF y₂ z₂ k₂))))) =
?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
           (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)) ;;2 
      ((#2 GG)
         (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁)
            ((#2 FF) s₂)) ;;2 pr1
                                (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                   (idpath (G (F x₂)))
                                   (idpath (G (F z₂)))
                                   (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂)
                                      (F z₂)
                                      (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
                                      (FF y₂ z₂ k₂))))) =
?b

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
(#2 GG)
  (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ ((#2 FF) s₁) ((#2 FF) s₂)) ;;2 
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₂)))
     (idpath (G (F z₂)))
     (GGc (F x₂) (F y₂) (F z₂) (FF x₂ y₂ h₂)
        (FF y₂ z₂ k₂))) = ?t2

    apply is_natural_preserves_hor_comp.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃

Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃

G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
           (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
               (idpath (G (F z₁)))
               (GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
                  (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                       Cm₃
                                       ((#2 GG)
                                          ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                       ((#2 GG)
                                          ((#2 FF) s₂))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ ((#2 GG)
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                 (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)) ;;2 
            (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
               (idpath (G (F z₁)))
               (GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
                  (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                       Cm₃
                                       ((#2 GG)
                                          ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                       ((#2 GG)
                                          ((#2 FF) s₂))))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂

s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
           (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)) ;;2 
      (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
         (idpath (G (F z₁)))
         (GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
            (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                 ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                 ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))) =

        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))

                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
