C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trb₂ ((#2 GG)
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                 (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)) ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
              (idpath (G (F z₁)))
              (GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
                 (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                      Cm₃
                                      ((#2 GG)
                                         ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                      ((#2 GG)
                                         ((#2 FF) s₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ ((#2 GG)
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
                 (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)) ;;2 
            idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
              (idpath (G (F z₁)))
              (GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
                 (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                      Cm₃
                                      ((#2 GG)
                                         ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                      ((#2 GG)
                                         ((#2 FF) s₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ ((#2 GG)
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (F x₁))
           (idpath (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)) ;;2 
      idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                (idpath (G (F x₁)))
                (idpath (G (F z₁)))
                (maponpaths
                   (λ xy : D₂ (F x₁) (F z₁),
                    GG (F x₁) (F z₁) xy)
                   (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₁)))
                                                (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F z₁)))
                                                (GGc
                                                 (F x₁)
                                                 (F y₁)
                                                 (F z₁)
                                                 (FF
                                                 x₁ y₁
                                                 h₁)
                                                 (FF
                                                 y₁ z₁
                                                 k₁)) ;;2 
      double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃ ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
        ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                (idpath (G (F x₁)))
                (idpath (G (F z₁)))
                (maponpaths
                   (λ xy : D₂ (F x₁) (F z₁),
                    GG (F x₁) (F z₁) xy)
                   (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₁)))
                                                (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F z₁)))
                                                (GGc
                                                 (F x₁)
                                                 (F y₁)
                                                 (F z₁)
                                                 (FF
                                                 x₁ y₁
                                                 h₁)
                                                 (FF
                                                 y₁ z₁
                                                 k₁)) ;;2 
      double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃ ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
        ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                 (idpath (G (F x₁)))
                 (idpath (G (F z₁)))
                 (maponpaths
                    (λ xy : D₂ (F x₁) (F z₁),
                     GG (F x₁) (F z₁) xy)
                    (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x₁)))
                                                 (idpath
                                                 (G
                                                 (F z₁)))
                                                 (GGc
                                                 (F x₁)
                                                 (F y₁)
                                                 (F z₁)
                                                 (FF
                                                 x₁ y₁
                                                 h₁)
                                                 (FF
                                                 y₁ z₁
                                                 k₁)) ;;2 
            double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
              ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
              ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
           (idpath (G (F z₁)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ xy : D₂ (F x₁) (F z₁),
               GG (F x₁) (F z₁) xy)
              (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                           (idpath
                                              (G
                                                 (F x₁)))
                                           (idpath
                                              (G
                                                 (F z₁)))
                                           (GGc (F x₁)
                                              (F y₁)
                                              (F z₁)
                                              (FF x₁
                                                 y₁ h₁)
                                              (FF y₁
                                                 z₁ k₁)) ;;2 
      double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃ ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
        ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
           (idpath (G (F z₁)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ xy : D₂ (F x₁) (F z₁),
               GG (F x₁) (F z₁) xy)
              (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                           (idpath
                                              (G
                                                 (F x₁)))
                                           (idpath
                                              (G
                                                 (F z₁)))
                                           (GGc (F x₁)
                                              (F y₁)
                                              (F z₁)
                                              (FF x₁
                                                 y₁ h₁)
                                              (FF y₁
                                                 z₁ k₁)) ;;2 
      double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃ ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
        ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂))) = ?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
?b =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
           (idpath (G (F z₁)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ xy : D₂ (F x₁) (F z₁),
               GG (F x₁) (F z₁) xy)
              (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                           (idpath
                                              (G
                                                 (F x₁)))
                                           (idpath
                                              (G
                                                 (F z₁)))
                                           (GGc (F x₁)
                                              (F y₁)
                                              (F z₁)
                                              (FF x₁
                                                 y₁ h₁)
                                              (FF y₁
                                                 z₁ k₁)) ;;2 
      double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃ ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
        ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂))) = ?b

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
     (idpath (G (F z₁)))
     (maponpaths
        (λ xy : D₂ (F x₁) (F z₁), GG (F x₁) (F z₁) xy)
        (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (G (F x₁)))
                                     (idpath
                                        (G (F z₁)))
                                     (GGc (F x₁)
                                        (F y₁) (F z₁)
                                        (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
                                        (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃ ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
  ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)) = ?t2

    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
     (idpath (G (F z₁)))
     (maponpaths
        (λ xy : D₂ (F x₁) (F z₁), GG (F x₁) (F z₁) xy)
        (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁))) ;;2 idtoiso_twosided_disp
                                     (idpath
                                        (G (F x₁)))
                                     (idpath
                                        (G (F z₁)))
                                     (GGc (F x₁)
                                        (F y₁) (F z₁)
                                        (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
                                        (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) =
?y'

    apply idtoiso_twosided_disp_concat.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trb₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                (idpath (G (F x₁)))
                (idpath (G (F z₁)))
                (maponpaths
                   (λ xy : D₂ (F x₁) (F z₁),
                    GG (F x₁) (F z₁) xy)
                   (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
                 GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁)
                   (FF x₁ y₁ h₁) (FF y₁ z₁ k₁))) ;;2 
      double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃ ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
        ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ pr1
             (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                (idpath (G (F x₁)))
                (idpath (G (F z₁)))
                (maponpaths
                   (λ xy : D₂ (F x₁) (F z₁),
                    GG (F x₁) (F z₁) xy)
                   (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
                 GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁)
                   (FF x₁ y₁ h₁) (FF y₁ z₁ k₁))) ;;2 
      double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃ ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
        ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (trf₂ (pr1
              (idtoiso_twosided_disp
                 (idpath (G (F x₁)))
                 (idpath (G (F z₁)))
                 (maponpaths
                    (λ xy : D₂ (F x₁) (F z₁),
                     GG (F x₁) (F z₁) xy)
                    (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
                  GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁)
                    (FF x₁ y₁ h₁) (FF y₁ z₁ k₁))) ;;2 
            double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
              ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
              ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trf₂ (pr1
        (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
           (idpath (G (F z₁)))
           (maponpaths
              (λ xy : D₂ (F x₁) (F z₁),
               GG (F x₁) (F z₁) xy)
              (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
            GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
              (FF y₁ z₁ k₁))) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                                    Cm₃
                                    ((#2 GG)
                                       ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                    ((#2 GG)
                                       ((#2 FF) s₂))) =
trf₂ (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
        (idpath (G (F z₁)))
        (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁))
           (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
         GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
           (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                                ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: C₁
vx: C₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: C₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: C₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: D₁ x₁ y₁
k₁: D₁ y₁ z₁
h₂: D₁ x₂ y₂
k₂: D₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
pr1
  (idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
     (idpath (G (F z₁)))
     (maponpaths
        (λ xy : D₂ (F x₁) (F z₁), GG (F x₁) (F z₁) xy)
        (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
      GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
        (FF y₁ z₁ k₁))) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                              ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                              ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂)) =
idtoiso_twosided_disp (idpath (G (F x₁)))
  (idpath (G (F z₁)))
  (maponpaths (GG (F x₁) (F z₁)) (FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁) @
   GGc (F x₁) (F y₁) (F z₁) (FF x₁ y₁ h₁)
     (FF y₁ z₁ k₁)) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
                          ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₁))
                          ((#2 GG) ((#2 FF) s₂))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₃
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₃
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
preserves_hor_comp_data Cm₁ Cm₃
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG)
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
preserves_hor_comp_laws ?FFc

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
preserves_hor_comp_data Cm₁ Cm₃
  (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF GG)
 exact (composition_preserves_hor_comp_data FFc GGc).
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FFc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₁ Cm₂ FF
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GGc: preserves_hor_comp Cm₂ Cm₃ GG
preserves_hor_comp_laws
  (composition_preserves_hor_comp_data FFc GGc)
 exact (composition_preserves_hor_comp_laws FFc GGc).
Defined.
